# x7q v0.1 Fixtures

- `valid_minimal.x7q`: minimal valid container with no sections.
- `invalid_magic.x7q`: minimal container shape with an invalid magic byte.
- `secure_valid.x7q`: valid x7q-secure v1.0 container with one payload section.
- `secure_invalid_hash.x7q`: x7q-secure v1.0 container with tampered payload bytes.
- `secure_payload.bin`: payload used by the v1.0 manifest fixture.
- `secure_build.manifest`: sample manifest for `x7q-secure build`.
